contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Deploy Edgar + wire orphan-reply reconciler into hourly cron
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1046
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/110
  
  Details:
  Closed the last two manual steps from the recurring-drift fix:
  
  1. Edgar deploy (./deploy.sh): completed exit 0. Investigated a persistent 401 on /proxy/gas: turned out to be a curl artifact — BotManager#rate_limit_bot_calls in ApplicationController returns :unauthorized when User-Agent header is nil. With a real User-Agent the proxy returns 200 OK + the expected drafts_by_label JSON. The DApp page (and any browser) was never affected. PR #1046's skip_before_action :require_login is harmless either way (no-op since :require_login isn't a registered filter on this controller chain) — left it in place as defensive doc.
  
  2. go_to_market #110 (merged): wired reconcile_orphan_reply_drafts.py into the existing hourly Email Agent Follow Up sync workflow as a third step after the existing sync + reply-promotion steps. Honors the existing dry_run workflow_dispatch input. Now the three drift loops (manual Gmail send, replied prospect, manual Reply UI) all self-heal hourly without operator intervention.
  
  The full Outbound Review pipeline now has automated self-healing for all three failure modes the operator hit today.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
